parameters.query: UPDATE quotes SET technician_id=$1, doc_status='en_revision', status='asignado' WHERE id=$2 RETURNING id, tech_token, payload->>'name' as client_name, payload->>'phone' as client_phone
SELECT name, email, phone FROM technicians WHERE id=$1

parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', to: $('Get technician').first().json.phone, type: 'template', template: { name: 'tech_assignment', language: { code: 'es' }, components: [{ type: 'body', parameters: [{ type: 'text', text: $('Merge quote data').first().json.clientName || 'Cliente' }, { type: 'text', text: String($('Merge quote data').first().json.quoteId) }] }] } }) }}
